traits.name: Vader's Fist
traits.text: If a small enemy is within 3 hexes of one or more 501st Legion and has fewer than three models in its hex, all of its skills have -1 {accuracy_die}.

factionTrait.text: A guardian moves the turn token +1 step when they have their banner on an objective hex during the end phase.

uniqueTraits.name: Creed of the Watch
uniqueTraits.text: Once during Din Djarin's activation, choose a banner within 2 hexes of Din Djarin and place it on another empty objective hex within 2 hexes of them.

ultimate.name: This is the Way
ultimate.text: Plot phase only. Din Djarin may use this skill as a bonus action. Every champion within range may take a claim action.

plotSkills.name: Jetpack Boost
plotSkills.text: Place Din Djarin on a hex up to 2 hexes from their current hex.

plotSkills.name: Cover Fire
plotSkills.text: Small followers within range gain {protection_boon}.

clashSkills.name: Amban Rifle
clashSkills.text: This skill gains {damage_die} equal to the amount the hit roll exceeds the target's {dodge}, to a maximum of 8 additional {damage_die}.

clashSkills.name: Whistling Birds
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move the target up to 1 hex away from Din Djarin and remove 1 wound from Din Djarin.

traits.name: Hidden Covert
traits.text: Enemy champions and followers can't be placed or recruited in hexes adjacent to Mandalorian Covert.

plotSkills.name: Evasive Maneuver
plotSkills.text: Gain {dodge_boon}

plotSkills.name: Flanking Fire
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move the target up to 1 hex away from this Mandalorian Covert and this Mandalorian Covert may move 1 hex toward the target.

clashSkills.name: Rally to the Mandalorian
clashSkills.text: If Din Djarin is within range, place them in a hex adjacent to this Mandalorian Covert.

clashSkills.name: Field Medic
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: You may remove 1 wound from Din Djarin.

factionTrait.name: Maelstrom Champion
factionTrait.text: A maelstrom moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy follower.

uniqueTraits.name: Feral Instinct
uniqueTraits.text: When Asajj Ventress knocks out an enemy follower, move a friendly model within 3 hexes of her up to 1 hex. Each model may only be moved once per activation using this trait.

ultimate.name: Hunt Them Down
ultimate.text: Move another model within range up to 3 hexes.

plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Asajj Ventress moves up to 2 hexes towards the target.

clashSkills.name: Twin Sabers
clashSkills.text: Target up to 3 models in a single hex. This skill has +1 {damage_die} for each hex adjacent to the target that contains one or more friendly followers.

clashSkills.name: Dark Reaping
clashSkills.text: This skill may target up to 2 followers within range. This skill has +1 {damage_die} for each hex adjacent to the target that contains one or more friendly followers.

traits.name: Hunt in Packs

plotSkills.name: Encircle

clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move each follower model in the target's hex up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Hamstring
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move a Anooba up to 1 hex.

plotSkills.name: Advance, Knights!
plotSkills.text: Move each Knight of Ren that is within range up to 2 hexes.

clashSkills.name: Dark Tide
clashSkills.text: If Kylo Ren's banner is within range, place it on an objective hex within range.

clashSkills.name: Reanimate
clashSkills.text: All friendly champions within range may make a rally action.

clashSkills.name: Soul Harvest
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: The Knights of Ren make a recruit action.

traits.name: Blades of Ren
traits.text: Enemy models that make an advance action while they are adjacent to a Knight of Ren have speed 0 during that advance action.

plotSkills.name: Guard the Master
plotSkills.text: If Kylo Ren is within range, he gains {dodge_boon}.

plotSkills.name: Recover the Master
plotSkills.text: If Kylo Ren is within range, he may make a rally action or move up to 2 hexes.

clashSkills.name: Cold Resolve
clashSkills.text: Grant {damage_die_boon}.

clashSkills.name: Last Stand
clashSkills.text: If the Knights of Ren made a recruit action this activation, Last Stand has +1 {accuracy_die} and {damage_die}.

factionTrait.name: Shaper Champion
factionTrait.text: A shaper moves the turn token +1 step when they make a claim action.

uniqueTraits.name: Jedi Master
uniqueTraits.text: If all 3 Jedi Younglings are on the battlefield when Luke Skywalker activates, she may make a bonus action that activation.

ultimate.name: Kyber Forge
ultimate.text: Plot phase only. Choose a Jedi Youngling that is the only model in its hex and is adjacent to an objective hex, and replace it with an objective hex. If it is within 2 hexes of Luke Skywalker, she may make a claim action on that hex.

plotSkills.name: Reflect
plotSkills.text: Choose a boon on any model within range. Then choose a friendly model within range to gain that boon.

plotSkills.name: Meditation
plotSkills.text: Gain {accuracy_die_boon}.

plotSkills.name: Advance
plotSkills.text: Move Luke Skywalker up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Disrupt
clashSkills.text: Choose a blight on any model within range. Then choose an enemy model within range to gain that blight.

clashSkills.name: Saber Cut
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {protection_blight}.

clashSkills.name: Blinding Flash
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {accuracy_die_blight}.

traits.name: Jedi Academy
traits.text: When Luke Skywalker's banner is removed from the battlefield, the Jedi Younglings may immediately make a recruit action, even if it is the end phase.

plotSkills.name: Form Up
plotSkills.text: If this Jedi Youngling is the only model in its hex and is adjacent to an objective hex, replace it with an objective hex.

plotSkills.name: Force Hold
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {move_blight}

clashSkills.name: Padawan Dash
clashSkills.text: Each Jedi Youngling may move up to 3 hexes in a straight line.

factionTrait.name: Shaper Champion
factionTrait.text: A shaper moves the turn token +1 step when they make a claim action.

uniqueTraits.name: It's a Trap!
uniqueTraits.text: When a Mon Cala Guard leaves the battlefield, Admiral Ackbar may gain the boon of your choice.

ultimate.name: Tidal Surge
ultimate.text: Place Admiral Ackbar on a hex within range. Then move each enemy model within 2 hexes of him up to 2 hexes in the order of your choice.

plotSkills.name: Riptide
plotSkills.text: Choose an empty objective hex within range. Place it on an empty non-objective hex within range.

plotSkills.name: Depth Charge
plotSkills.text: Choose a hex within range containing one Mon Cala Guard. Remove the Mon Cala Guard and place Admiral Ackbar in that hex.

plotSkills.name: Torpedo Run
plotSkills.text: Move a Mon Cala Guard within range up to 3 hexes.

clashSkills.name: Depth Charge
clashSkills.text: Choose a hex within range containing one Mon Cala Guard. Remove the Mon Cala Guard and place Admiral Ackbar in that hex.

clashSkills.name: Ramming Speed
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Boarding Strike
clashSkills.text: Before the hit roll, move Admiral Ackbar up to 1 hex towards the target.

traits.name: Mon Cala Fleet
traits.text: Once per phase during the Mon Cala Guards' activation, you may choose a boon on Admiral Ackbar. The Mon Cala Guards gain that boon.

plotSkills.name: Drift
plotSkills.text: You may place each Mon Cala Guard in a hex up to 3 hexes from its current hex.

plotSkills.name: Wave Crash
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Drift
clashSkills.text: You may place each Mon Cala Guard in a hex up to 3 hexes from its current hex.

clashSkills.name: Wave Crash
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex.

factionTrait.name: Slayer Champion
factionTrait.text: A slayer moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy champion.

uniqueTraits.name: Marauder Chief
uniqueTraits.text: Once per hit roll or damage roll before rolling the dice, you may remove one Cloud-Rider from a hex within 3 hexes of Enfys Nest to add 1 die to Enfys Nest's roll.

ultimate.name: Raider's Charge
ultimate.text: Move Enfys Nest up to 2 hexes. Then you may place up to 2 wounds on an enemy within range.

plotSkills.name: War Fury
plotSkills.text: Gain {damage_die_boon}

plotSkills.name: Intimidate
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {dodge_blight}.

clashSkills.name: Vibro-Lance
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex away from Enfys Nest.

clashSkills.name: Grapple Line
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex toward Enfys Nest.

traits.name: Swoop Raiders
traits.text: If the Cloud-Riders cause an enemy model to gain a wound when they use a skill action, they may gain one boon of your choice.

plotSkills.name: Recruit Raiders
plotSkills.text: If the Cloud-Riders are below their maximum unit size, add one to a hex containing at least one Cloud-Rider.

plotSkills.name: Raid
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: The target gains 1 wound.

clashSkills.name: Raid
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: The target gains 1 wound.

factionTrait.name: Shaper Champion
factionTrait.text: A shaper moves the turn token +1 step when they make a claim action.

uniqueTraits.name: Separatist Leader
uniqueTraits.text: At the end of Count Dooku's activation, roll one die. If you roll a 1 or 2, you may remove a boon or blight from a model within that many hexes of Count Dooku and place it on a different model within that many hexes.

ultimate.name: Tactical Overload
ultimate.text: Choose one blight for each B1 Battle Droid within range. Each enemy champion within range gains those blights.

plotSkills.name: Deploy Droids
plotSkills.text: Remove any number of B1 Battle Droids from the battlefield. Then place them on hexes within 2 hexes of Count Dooku.

plotSkills.name: Targeting Jammer
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {move_blight} or {dodge_blight}.

clashSkills.name: Mark Territory
clashSkills.text: Place up to two objective hexes on empty non-objective hexes within range. Remove them at the end of the clash phase.

clashSkills.name: Ion Burst
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {accuracy_die_blight} or {damage_die_blight}.

traits.name: Roger, Roger
traits.text: When Count Dooku rolls a blank on her Roll the Bones roll, the B1 Battle Droids may gain the boon of your choice.

plotSkills.name: Reroute Power
plotSkills.text: Gain the boon of your choice.

plotSkills.name: Blaster Bolt
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: The target gains the blight of your choice.

clashSkills.name: Transfer Protocol
clashSkills.text: Move all boons and blights from the B1 Battle Droids to a friendly model within range.

clashSkills.name: Blaster Bolt
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: The target gains the blight of your choice.

factionTrait.name: Guardian Champion
factionTrait.text: A guardian moves the turn token +1 step when they have their banner on an objective hex during the end phase.

uniqueTraits.name: Loyal to the End
uniqueTraits.text: If Captain Rex is adjacent to a friendly banner, he cannot be moved by enemy models.

ultimate.name: Lockdown
ultimate.text: Clash phase only. Make a claim action.

plotSkills.name: Patrol
plotSkills.text: Move Captain Rex up to 1 hex.

plotSkills.name: Call Reinforcements
plotSkills.text: Choose a follower within range. Its unit makes a recruit action.

plotSkills.name: Hold the Line
plotSkills.text: Grant {protection_boon}.

clashSkills.name: Patrol
clashSkills.text: Move Captain Rex up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Riot Shield
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {damage_die_blight}. Move target up to 2 hexes away from Captain Rex.

traits.name: Form Up!
traits.text: Clone Troopers in hexes adjacent to Captain Rex cannot be moved by enemy models.

plotSkills.name: Riot Stance
plotSkills.text: Gain {protection_boon}.

plotSkills.name: Patrol
plotSkills.text: Move each Clone Troopers up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Patrol
clashSkills.text: Move each Clone Troopers up to 1 hex.

factionTrait.name: Shaper Champion
factionTrait.text: A shaper moves the turn token +1 step when they make a claim action.

uniqueTraits.name: Scoundrel
uniqueTraits.text: After Han Solo makes an action during his activation, if he is within 3 hexes of Chewbacca, you may place Chewbacca in a hex up to 2 hexes from its current hex.

ultimate.name: Kessel Run
ultimate.text: Choose any number of objective hexes within 3 hexes of Chewbacca. Move each up to 1 hex onto an empty non-objective hex in any order. Models on the objective hexes move with them.

plotSkills.name: Let the Wookiee Win
plotSkills.text: If Chewbacca is within range, it gains {protection_boon} or {damage_die_boon}.

plotSkills.name: Swindle
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move a boon from the target to any model within range.

clashSkills.name: Disarm
clashSkills.text: Remove all boons from enemies within range.

clashSkills.name: Pin Down
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {move_blight}.

traits.name: Loyal Co-Pilot
traits.text: When Chewbacca is knocked out, replace it with an objective hex.

plotSkills.name: Wookiee Roar
plotSkills.text: Friendly and enemy models adjacent to Chewbacca gain {protection_blight}.

plotSkills.name: Bowcaster Blast
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target champion or all followers in target's unit up to 2 hexes.

clashSkills.name: Bowcaster Blast
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target champion or all followers in target's unit up to 2 hexes.

clashSkills.name: Wookiee Slam
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {dodge_blight}

factionTrait.name: Slayer Champion
factionTrait.text: A slayer moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy champion.

uniqueTraits.name: Unstoppable
uniqueTraits.text: Savage Opress may move through small followers' hexes but cannot end his movement on those hexes.

ultimate.name: Unbound Rage
ultimate.text: Clash phase only. Savage Opress may make up to 3 skill actions.

plotSkills.name: Shrug It Off
plotSkills.text: Remove a blight from Savage Opress.

plotSkills.name: Brothers, Attack!
plotSkills.text: Follower units within range gain {accuracy_die_boon}.

clashSkills.name: Bloodlust
clashSkills.text: Savage Opress's Double Saber skill gains +4 {accuracy_die} and 'Hit Effect: The target gains 1 wound.' this activation.

clashSkills.name: Savage Strike
clashSkills.text: Savage Opress's Double Saber skill gains +2 {damage_die} and 'Hit Effect: Move target up to 2 hexes.' this activation.

clashSkills.name: Double Saber
clashSkills.text: After using this skill, Savage Opress gains {move_blight}.

traits.name: For the Brotherhood
traits.text: When a Nightbrother damages an enemy, Savage Opress may gain a boon of your choice or move 1 hex.

plotSkills.name: Charge
plotSkills.text: Choose a hex. Each Nightbrother in that hex may move up to 2 hexes.

plotSkills.name: War Chant
plotSkills.text: This skill has +1 {accuracy_die} for each Nightbrother adjacent to the target. Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex. Inflict {dodge_blight}

clashSkills.name: Rage
clashSkills.text: Gain {damage_die_boon}.

clashSkills.name: Brutal Smash
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: The target gains 1 wound.

factionTrait.name: Slayer Champion
factionTrait.text: A slayer moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy champion.

uniqueTraits.name: Han Shot First
uniqueTraits.text: Greedo's skills have +1 {accuracy_die} for each Rodian Hunter adjacent to the target.

ultimate.name: Ambush Pounce
ultimate.text: Before the hit roll, you may place Greedo on a hex adjacent to the target.

plotSkills.name: Slip Away
plotSkills.text: You may place Greedo on a hex up to 2 hexes from his current hex.

plotSkills.name: Treacherous Strike
plotSkills.text: If this attack hits a champion, the champion gains 1 wound.

clashSkills.name: Scheme
clashSkills.text: Grant {accuracy_die_boon}

clashSkills.name: Taunt
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target up to 2 hexes toward Greedo.

clashSkills.name: Treacherous Strike
clashSkills.text: If this attack hits a champion, the champion gains 1 wound.

traits.name: Cantina Lowlifes
traits.text: Rodian Hunters may move through other models' hexes but cannot end their movement on those hexes.

plotSkills.name: Scurry
plotSkills.text: One Rodian Hunter may move up to 3 hexes.

clashSkills.name: Vanish
clashSkills.text: Remove one Rodian Hunter from the battlefield. Then make a recruit action.

clashSkills.name: Harass
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {accuracy_die_blight}.

factionTrait.name: Shaper Champion
factionTrait.text: A shaper moves the turn token +1 step when they make a claim action.

uniqueTraits.name: Crimson Dawn
uniqueTraits.text: When Darth Maul is knocked out, your opponent may not move him.

ultimate.name: Death Sentence
ultimate.text: Knock out an enemy model within range. It does not award you any steps on the battle ladder.

plotSkills.name: Hunt the Prey
plotSkills.text: Darth Maul may use this skill as a bonus action. An enemy model within range gains {protection_blight}.

plotSkills.name: Force Pull
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex toward Darth Maul.

clashSkills.name: Phantom Step
clashSkills.text: Move one objective hex within range 1 hex toward Darth Maul onto an empty non-objective hex. Models on the objective hex move with it.

clashSkills.name: Saber Reaver
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {damage_die_blight}.

traits.name: Hunting Beasts
traits.text: At the end of the Corellian Hounds' activation, move up to 2 small follower models within 2 hexes of an Corellian Hound, 1 hex towards that Corellian Hound.

plotSkills.name: Pack Tactics
plotSkills.text: Move each Corellian Hound within 4 hexes of Darth Maul up to 2 hexes.

plotSkills.name: Bloodcurdling Howl
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {accuracy_die_blight}

clashSkills.name: Tear Apart
clashSkills.text: If both Corellian Hounds are adjacent to the same enemy banner, remove the banner from the battlefield.

clashSkills.name: Frenzy
clashSkills.text: Make 3 hit rolls instead of 1. For each hit, this skill has +2 {damage_die}.

factionTrait.name: Maelstrom Champion
factionTrait.text: A maelstrom moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy follower.

uniqueTraits.name: Trophy Collector
uniqueTraits.text: General Grievous has +1 {dodge} against followers' hit rolls and +1 {protection} against followers' damage rolls.

ultimate.name: Jedi Hunter
ultimate.text: General Grievous may make a skill action. Then he may move 1 hex. Then he may make another skill action.

plotSkills.name: Cornered Prey
plotSkills.text: An enemy model within range gains two different blights of your choice. General Grievous gains a blight of your opponent's choice.

plotSkills.name: Slaughter
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move all followers in target's unit that are within range up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Four-Arm Flurry
clashSkills.text: This skill may target up to two models in the same hex.

clashSkills.name: Whirling Sabers
clashSkills.text: This skill may target up to two models that are in different hexes.

traits.name: IG-100 Series
traits.text: After using a recruit action, the MagnaGuard returned to the battlefield moves up to 2 hexes.

plotSkills.name: Electrostaff Guard
plotSkills.text: One champion within range may move 1 hex.

plotSkills.name: Flank
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Place each MagnaGuard that is adjacent to the target in a hex adjacent to the target.

clashSkills.name: Staff Jab
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {protection_blight}

clashSkills.name: Gang Up
clashSkills.text: This skill has +1 {accuracy_die} and +1 {damage_die} for each other hex adjacent to the target that contains one or more MagnaGuards.
